description: Court record. Written by Avraham b. Natan Av (Date: 1098–1114). (Or rather Hillel b. ʿEli?) The main party is a husband certifying in Jewish court "the first sale which she (my wife) sold you in Muslim courts"; mentions the dwelling he lives in and expenses for construction; delaying something until Monday the 22nd of [...]; and the qāʿa which the other party lives in.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
